name: DoIP_GetInitialTimeout, DoIP_SetInitialTimeout
title: DoIP_GetInitialTimeout, DoIP_SetInitialTimeout
description: Sets or returns the initial timeout, started when a tester connects to the ECU (in milliseconds). A route activation request must be received in this interval, otherwise the TCP connection is closed.
If routing activation requests are switched off in the DoIP.INI via DisableRouteActivation, this timeout is not checked.
This value can also be configured in the DoIP.INI file.
